podcast_subtitle: Fishing, outdoors and Northern Territory news
podcast_description: A daily good-news bulletin covering recreational fishing, the outdoors and the Northern Territory, Australia and further afield, with the doom-and-gloom left out.
_media_note: FUTURE Supabase: set media_base_url + media_bucket and uncomment the upload block in publish.py to move MP3s off git.

voice.instructions: Read like a professional radio news presenter: calm, clear, measured and confident. Neutral Australian English. Even pace, natural sentence rhythm, no exaggeration or hype.

_previous_elevenlabs.note: To revert: set provider to elevenlabs and api_key_env to ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.
